overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded medieval character walking through a rural village. The character passes a blacksmith's workshop with an active outdoor forge, continues past wooden barns and carts, and proceeds down a dirt road toward a smoky area with horses grazing nearby. The setting features traditional wooden and stone architecture with bright natural lighting.

events.description: character walks past the outdoor stone forge and the NPC standing nearby

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the blacksmith's workshop and outdoor forge

notable_agents.action: standing near the stone forge with arms raised, appearing to work or gesture

entered.detail: open-air wooden workshop with slanted shingle roof and heavy timber support beams
outdoor stone fireplace with visible flames and cooking apparatus inside
stacked wooden barrels and buckets near the workshop entrance
cluster of traditional wooden houses with thatched roofs visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a semi-covered blacksmith's workshop area, passing wooden barrels and an outdoor stone forge where an NPC stands working. The setting is a medieval rural village with timber-framed structures and a dirt path leading forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village area with barns and wooden carts

events.description: passing the large barn building and entering the main village road with carts visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past the large barn building and continuing along the dirt road toward the open village area

entered.detail: large wooden barn with dark shingled roof, stone foundation, and timber walls
wooden wagon with curved canvas cover parked near the roadside
simple wooden post fence lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Leaving the workshop behind, the character passes a large wooden barn on the left and enters a more open area of the village. Wooden carts and fences line the dirt road as the character continues walking through the rural setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: main village road with livestock and distant smoke

events.description: passing horses grazing near stone walls along the right side of the road
approaching dense smoke plumes rising from buildings ahead in the village

agents.ego_description: walking down the main dirt road toward the smoky area at the center of the village

notable_agents.action: horses standing and grazing near the stone wall on the right side of the road

entered.detail: thick columns of dark gray smoke rising from buildings in the distance indicating fire or industry
low stone wall running alongside the dirt road bordering the village properties

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down the main village road, passing horses grazing by a stone wall on the right. Thick smoke plumes rise from buildings ahead, becoming denser as the character approaches the center of the village. Wooden carts and fences continue to line the dirt path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural medieval village that transitions from a sheltered workshop area into an open, smoke-filled village center. It begins within a semi-covered blacksmith's workshop, passing wooden barrels and a stone forge where a worker is active. As the character leaves the workshop behind, the scene opens up to reveal a large wooden barn and a dirt road lined with fences and carts. The camera then proceeds further down the main path, passing horses grazing by a stone wall as the clear air gradually gives way to thick plumes of smoke. The movement finally leads toward the heart of the village, where the smoke becomes denser and more pervasive against the backdrop of timber-framed structures.
